title: voiage: Value of Information Analysis

authors.name: Dylan A. Mordaunt
authors.affiliation: Faculty of Health, Education and Psychology, Victoria University of Wellington; College of Medicine and Public Health, Flinders University; Centre for Health Policy, The University of Melbourne

abstract: Parameter-focused Value of Information analysis does not by itself represent uncertainty about model structure, population heterogeneity, analytical perspective, implementation, evidence quality, or decision timing. voiage implements shared, maturity-labelled data and result structures for classical VOI estimands and these wider decision problems, recording strategy, sample, subgroup, perspective, population, diagnostic, and provenance metadata.
comments: Draft for author review. Page and figure counts require confirmation after final typesetting.
